name: Trick Kibbeh
recipeIngredient: -1/2 hour in enough water to cover
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the soaked bulgur, flour, 1/2 tablespoon salt, cinnamon, green onions, mint, and parsley in a bowl until a thick dough forms.
2. Roll the mixture into 24 very firm balls, each about the size of a large marble. Set aside to dry.
3. In a pot, bring 9 cups of chicken stock to a boil. Add lentils and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Reduce heat and add the bulgur balls to the pot. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Add lemon juice, garlic, and oil. Continue simmering until the balls are cooked through, about 10 more minutes.
6. Garnish with thin lemon slices before serving.
